note: Source of truth for the module catalog. A CI drift-linter should verify every module here has a matching reference playbook and that SKILL.md phase pointers stay consistent. 'deterministic' modules run a tool and emit SARIF/JSON; 'judgment' modules require model reasoning over the graph + findings.

modules.notes: Backbone = Graphify (MIT license; models DB schema as nodes; spans DB<->API<->frontend; exports plain NetworkX graph.json with stable node ids + source_location + EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS confidence). Cross-layer edges are the INFERRED tier (LLM semantic pass, unbenchmarked) -> use as hints, compute field-level shapes yourself. Semantic pass can run fully local via Ollama (privacy). GitNexus is OPTIONAL secondary for deterministic blast-radius in remediation ONLY; it is PolyForm Noncommercial (no commercial use) and does not model DB schema or link separate frontend/backend trees, so it cannot be the backbone.
Visual-first, descriptive. Documents the mess as it is. Never the to-be.
THE core module. Extracts the implied contract at each boundary (DB<->ORM<->API<->frontend) and diffs the shapes. Verifiable. Read the full playbook.
Distinguishes intentional stub / not-yet-built / gap-toward-to-be from defect. Sets is_intentional_stub. Critical for unfinished codebases.
Vibecode signature: auth returning true, empty catch, NotImplemented on prod paths, TODO in live code. Semantic + text pass.
Commoditized. Usually question:null (goes straight to remediation, still plan-gated). Promote to needs_input only on scope ambiguity.
Scans working tree AND full git history (secrets committed then 'removed').
SCA + IaC misconfig + license via Trivy; OSV for lockfile vulns.
The vibecode duplication symptom. Feeds consolidate remediation (canonical copy).
Cyclomatic complexity, function length. Feeds hotspot heatmap with git churn.
Language-gated (run per language tokei detected). On slop, dead code may be a half-built feature: may promote to a scope question.
churn x complexity hotspots; co-change coupling (hidden coupling); bus factor. Mostly a git-log script.
Anti coverage-theater. Language-gated, slow: run only on critical modules. Green tests that survive mutation test nothing.
Silent-failure logic, wrong business logic, unhandled states. Model reasoning over graph + to-be. Highest false-positive risk: gate hard via fp-check.
MANDATORY gate. Systematic false-positive verification before a finding becomes a surfaced pin. AI over-reports; this is non-negotiable.
Materializes Question objects from needs_input pins. Runs the compression funnel (cluster -> policy -> exception -> proposed default) with the severity threshold.
